sentences.arabic: فِي عُطْلَةِ نِهَايَةِ الأُسْبُوعِ، تَذْهَبُ الأُسْرَةُ لِلنُّزْهَةِ.
sentences.translation: Za vikend, porodica ide na izlet.
sentences.translationEn: On the weekend, the family goes on a picnic.

sentences.arabic: يَخْتَارُونَ مَكَانًا جَمِيلًا قَرِيبًا مِنَ الطَّبِيعَةِ.
sentences.translationEn: They choose a beautiful place close to nature.
The mother prepares food and drinks.

sentences.translation: Djeca se igraju, a odrasli se odmaraju.
sentences.translationEn: The children play and the adults rest.
